assertions.description: U1 LM1117-3.3 receives 12V input and outputs 3.3V. With ESP32-WROOM-32 (240mA) + PCA9685BS (10mA) = 250mA, the dropout is 8.7V giving 2175mW dissipation. LM1117 in SOT-223 is typically rated 800-1500mW. The analyzer correctly identifies this as a thermal concern. Real design risk.
